description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a robust black metal receiver and barrel, paired with a wooden stock and fore-end. The stock is full-sized and ergonomically shaped, made from a dark brown wood with a smooth finish. The fore-end, also wooden, is ribbed for enhanced grip and is positioned beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a simple front sight and no visible venting or ribbing along its length. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, enclosing a single trigger and providing basic protection. Overall, the shotgun has a classic, utilitarian appearance suitable for both urban and rural environments.
description: A classic pump-action shotgun with a black metal barrel and receiver, complemented by a full wooden stock and ribbed wooden fore-end. The design is utilitarian and robust, with a rounded trigger guard and simple front sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the black metal barrel, receiver, and the dark brown wooden stock and ribbed fore-end.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the ribbed fore-end beneath, with the width of the shotgun minimized.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, again showing the full profile of the shotgun, including the wooden stock and fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel, with the ribbed fore-end visible below.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
